metadata.description: A lean frontend design-and-ship skill library for Claude Code.

plugins.name: personal-skills
plugins.description: Generic, repo-agnostic frontend design-and-ship skills: the-one-move, improve-platform and ui-check commands, the impeccable build engine, the taste suite, ui-ux-pro-max, audit primitives, corpus-flow, and bootstrap-vps-deploy. See ATTRIBUTION.md.
